choices: If the first 4 choices are taken, then click here!
1.content:
I pulled up to the driveway of your home, debating if I should even walk inside or not. It had been several months since we last talked after I screwed you over with money. You went off on me that day and said that I was going to regret screwing you over, and unfortunately for me, I was soon about to have a new life, a life where my only purpose is to please you and let you smother and do whatever you want with me.

"What are you doing here, Billy?" I said to myself as I shook my head. "Screw it!" Turning the engine off to my Dodge pickup truck, I opened the door, unbuckled my seat belt and stepped out. I decided to face my fears, hoping that you invited me so the two of us could get it behind us.

As I walked towards the front door, I stopped for a moment to watch a drunk couple make out right before my very eyes. "Ugh. Get a room."

Rolling my eyes, I felt a little jealous, but shook it off. I began to walk inside and already see a bunch of young adults already drunk and making a fool of themselves.

Walking passed everyone, not even wanting to pay attention, I walked into the kitchen and grabbed a red solo cup. Pouring myself a cup of red punch, I pulled my cell phone out and started searching through my social media, unaware that you were behind me, dropping a shrinking pill in my punch.

I quickly gulped it down and almost immediately felt sick to my stomach. I ran to the bathroom and groaned, closing the door behind me.

You smirked as you walked up to the bathroom door, asking if I was alright. "I-I'm fine!" I shouted, but I really wasn't.

I began to shrink into my clothes, and soon enough, got swallowed by my own clothes. You opened the bathroom door and glanced down at the pile of clothes with a smirk on your lips. You quickly forced everyone out of your house before you kicked the clothes around and found my tiny, naked body squirming.

Grinning, you reached down to pick me up....

NOTE: After this chapter, you will control what your character does and says from here on out. I only had to control your moves just for the opening!
1.title: The day night that my life changed forever

info.brief_description: A 1st-Person roleplay interactive story. Please be sure to read the rules!
info.description:
THE STORYLINE:
In this interactive roleplay, you and I are former best friends. One day, out of the blue, you invited me to your house party, except your only intentions are to shrink me down to only a few inches. The moment I shrink, you force everyone to leave so you can begin my horrific torture and punishments for screwing you over with money.


THE RULES AND GUIDELINES:
-This story is meant to be written in 1st-person POV. (EX: I scream as your giant hand begins to descend towards me to pick me up).
-At least a decent paragraph consisting of at least 6 or more lines are required for each response. I don't like short replies, especially if there's no detail.
-You can play as yourself, or you can create your own character. If you do play as yourself, don't give out too much personal information, obviously.
-There should be only ONE choice option per response, so the roleplay goes in only one direction instead of multiple different ways.
-Proper spelling and grammar IS important. Please be sure to use the spell check if you're unsure if you spelled a word right. This doesn't include typos.
-You can kill me off at some point, but don't do it too soon. Wait until the 15th or 20th chapter or even longer before ending my life.
-You can create up to at least two characters. Please save room for anyone else that may want to get involved with this roleplay.
-Nothing sexual with animals. That's one thing I don't want involved. You can, however, be as filthy and disgusting towards me as you want!
-Do NOT add to anyone else's roleplay with me. There will be plenty of chances for you to join in on the fun!
-Remember, I'm the one that gets shrunk. You're playing the giant/giantess.
-No God-modding. That means you don't control my character's actions. You control only your character's actions.


NOTE: I have the right to edit and/or delete any and new addition that you submit, if any of them violate the rules and guidelines listed above. As long as you follow them, your chapter will be safe. If you have any questions, feel free to message me!
info.pretty_title: The Day I Was Shrunk by YOU
